title: lgwks.capability.action.v1
description: The execution boundary (#120): the only contract the daemon's Hand will execute. A model proposes; execution must be a typed, validated action. `verb` MUST be a member of the live lgwks.map.v1 capability vocabulary; `effect_class` and `reversibility` are DECLARED (not inferred); an `irreversible` action must carry `confirmed:true` and `undo:null`. Distinct from lgwks.capability.v2 (the auth token) — an action references the authority it needs via `required_authority.scopes`. `verb`+`effect_class`+`reversibility`+`required_authority` are the locked public interface #121 lowers triggers into and #122 lists as allowed_capabilities.

verb.description: must be a member of the lgwks.map.v1 verb catalog

proposing_event_id.description: back-ref into the #118 event that proposed this

undo.description: compensating-action ref {verb,args}, or null when irreversible

confirmed.description: explicit human/governance confirmation; REQUIRED true for an irreversible effect
